title: Hyware
description: A Vanilla Style Hypixel Skyblock texture pack!
body:
## A Vanilla Style Hypixel Skyblock texture pack! 
The main goal of this texture pack is too keep some what the vanilla feel to all items in the game!

**·** [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/finnaware#) **·** [Discord](https://discord.gg/r2P27u24bj) **·**

**There are two versions of the texure pack:** The _Vanilla_ version and the _Catharsis_ version. 

Both are the same, but we **_HIGHLY_** recommend you use the Catharsis version as the vanilla version is kept for those who prefer as such.

- The _Vanilla_ is version you just drop it in and use as a regular texture pack, it's that easy. (+ Optional [Catharsis](https://modrinth.com/mod/catharsis) dependacy for stuff that can't be added vanilla)

<details>
<summary>Cartharsis requirement for Vanilla version</summary>

![Currently what the texture pack includes, and the requirements for Catharsis on the vanilla version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/473d2c8ff24e27a7a38eb02769af3e2a4d187c6f.png)

</details>

- The _Catharsis_ version is pretty much the same but it requires Catharsis to work it also adds some really neat customization options, by clicking the gear icon in the texture pack screen! (Check the Image bellow)

<details>
<summary>Image</summary>

![Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d7e6d854c1f4bf1d472cc908a1fbb84d77cef36.png)

</details>

⚠️ IMPORTANT CATHARSIS VERSION

The pack file name must end with .cats (or .cats.zip if you have file extensions enabled).

If your OS (Windows, macOS or Linux) renames it to .cats (1) (or .cats (1).zip if you have file extensions enabled), it won’t work. **This is fixed if using Catharsis 1.0.0-beta.10 or newer**

✅ Fix: rename it back to .cats  (or .cats.zip if you have file extensions enabled).

## 

Feedback is highly apreciated! If you feel any textures need polish or should be changed don't be afraid to tell me! If you wish to be informed on updates when they come out join the discord!

###  Credits
[Vixen](https://github.com/Gilgames32/vixen) model by Gilgames32, modified by Finnaware
